---
title: Welcome to RustQC
description: Fast quality control tools for sequencing data, written in Rust.
template: doc
tableOfContents: false
head:
  - tag: style
    content: |
      /* Hide the auto-generated h1 container (including its border) */
      .content-panel:first-child { display: none !important; }
      .main-pane { --sl-content-width: 67.5rem; }
---

import { Card, CardGrid } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";

export const base = import.meta.env.BASE_URL;

<div class="hero" role="banner">
  <img src={`${base}RustQC-icon.svg`} alt="" width="400" height="400" />
  <div class="sl-flex stack">
    <div class="sl-flex copy">
      <h1 id="_top">Welcome to RustQC</h1>
      <div class="tagline">
        A blazingly fast reimplementation of{" "}
        <a href="https://bioconductor.org/packages/dupRadar/">dupRadar</a>,{" "}
        <a href="https://subread.sourceforge.net/">featureCounts</a>,{" "}
        <a href="https://rseqc.sourceforge.net/">RSeQC</a>,{" "}
        <a href="http://qualimap.conesalab.org/">Qualimap</a>,{" "}
        <a href="https://daehwankimlab.github.io/preseq/">preseq</a>, and{" "}
        <a href="https://www.htslib.org/">samtools</a> in Rust, delivering
        identical results dramatically faster.
      </div>
    </div>
    <div
      class="benchmark-chart"
      role="img"
      aria-label="Benchmark: RustQC ~32m vs traditional tools ~9h 21m+ sequential (AWS)"
    >
      <div class="bench-row">
        <span class="bench-label">RustQC</span>
        <div class="bench-track">
          <div class="bench-bar rustqc-bar" style="--pct: 5.68%">
            <div
              class="bench-seg"
              data-tip="Everything else — 6m 33s"
              style="flex: 393"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg"
              data-tip="read_duplication — 11m 45s"
              style="flex: 705; opacity: 0.75"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg"
              data-tip="TIN — 11m 04s"
              style="flex: 664; opacity: 0.55"
            ></div>
          </div>
          <span class="bench-time">31m 53s</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="bench-row">
        <span class="bench-label">Traditional tools</span>
        <div class="bench-track">
          <div class="bench-bar trad-bar" style="--pct: 100%">
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-dupradar"
              data-tip="dupRadar — 45m 30s"
              style="flex: 2730"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-qualimap"
              data-tip="Qualimap — 37m 07s"
              style="flex: 2227"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-samtools"
              data-tip="samtools (3 tools) — 15m 22s"
              style="flex: 922"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-preseq"
              data-tip="preseq — 22m 39s"
              style="flex: 1359"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-fc"
              data-tip="featureCounts — 3m 31s"
              style="flex: 211"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-rseqc"
              data-tip="RSeQC (7 tools) — 1h 17m 01s"
              style="flex: 5821"
            ></div>
            <div
              class="bench-seg seg-tin"
              data-tip="tin.py — aborted after 6h"
              style="flex: 21750"
            ></div>
          </div>
          <span class="bench-time">9h 21m+</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="bench-tooltip" id="bench-tooltip"></div>
      <p class="bench-caption">
        Run time for a large paired-end RNA-seq BAM (~186M reads) on AWS. RSeQC
        TIN process timed out after 6h.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="sl-flex actions not-content">
      <a class="sl-link-button primary" href="getting-started/introduction/">
        Get Started{" "}
        <svg
          aria-hidden="true"
          width="16"
          height="16"
          viewBox="0 0 24 24"
          fill="currentColor"
        >
          <path d="m14.707 5.636 5.657 5.657a1 1 0 0 1 0 1.414l-5.657 5.657a1 1 0 0 1-1.414-1.414L17.243 13H4a1 1 0 1 1 0-2h13.243l-3.95-3.95a1 1 0 1 1 1.414-1.414Z"></path>

        View on GitHub{" "}
        <svg

</div>

<style>{`
  .hero {
    display: grid;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .hero > img {
    object-fit: contain;
    width: min(70%, 20rem);
    height: auto;
    margin-inline: auto;
  }
  .hero .stack {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: clamp(1.5rem, calc(1.5rem + 1vw), 2rem);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .hero .copy {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1rem;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .hero .copy > * {
    max-width: 50ch;
  }
  .hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(var(--sl-text-3xl), calc(0.25rem + 5vw), var(--sl-text-6xl));
    line-height: var(--sl-line-height-headings);
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--sl-color-white);
  }
  .hero .tagline {
    font-size: clamp(var(--sl-text-base), calc(0.0625rem + 2vw), var(--sl-text-xl));
    color: var(--sl-color-gray-2);
  }
  .hero .tagline a {
    color: var(--sl-color-white);
  }
  .hero .actions {
    gap: 1rem 2rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .hero .actions a {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5em;
    border-radius: 999rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    line-height: 1.1875;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-size: var(--sl-text-base);
    font-weight: 500;
  }
  .hero .actions a.primary {
    background: var(--sl-color-text-accent);
    border: 1px solid var(--sl-color-text-accent);
    color: var(--sl-color-black);
  }
  .hero .actions a.primary:hover {
    color: var(--sl-color-black);
  }
  .hero .actions a.minimal {
    border: 1px solid;
    padding-inline: 1.25rem;
    color: var(--sl-color-white);
  }
  .benchmark-chart {
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    max-width: 42rem;
    margin-inline: auto;
    padding-block: 0.75rem;
  }
  .bench-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .bench-label {
    flex: 0 0 9rem;
    text-align: right;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    line-height: 1.2;
    white-space: nowrap;
    color: var(--sl-color-white);
  }
  .bench-track {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .bench-bar {
    height: 2.8rem;
    width: var(--pct);
    display: flex;
    border-radius: 5px;
    overflow: hidden;
    min-width: 2rem;
  }
  .bench-seg {
    height: 100%;
    margin: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.15s, filter 0.15s;
    cursor: default;
    position: relative;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
  }
  .bench-seg:last-child {
    border-right: none;
  }
  .bench-seg:hover {
    filter: brightness(1.25);
    z-index: 1;
  }
  .rustqc-bar .bench-seg {
    background: var(--sl-color-accent);
  }
  .seg-dupradar  { background: #e05252; }
  .seg-qualimap  { background: #8b5cf6; }
  .seg-samtools  { background: #22c55e; }
  .seg-preseq    { background: #f59e0b; }
  .seg-fc        { background: #f97316; }
  .seg-rseqc     { background: #3b82f6; }
  .seg-tin       { background: #3b82f6; opacity: 0.7; }
  .bench-time {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
    color: var(--sl-color-white);
  }
  .bench-tooltip {
    display: none;
    position: absolute;
    background: var(--sl-color-gray-1);
    color: var(--sl-color-gray-7);
    padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    white-space: nowrap;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 10;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
  }
  .bench-caption {
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    color: var(--sl-color-gray-3);
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
  }
  @media (min-width: 53.125rem) {
    .hero {
      grid-template-columns: 7fr 4fr;
      gap: 3%;
      padding-block: clamp(2.5rem, calc(1rem + 10vmin), 10rem);
    }
    .hero > img {
      order: 2;
      width: min(100%, 25rem);
    }
    .hero .stack {
      text-align: start;
    }
    .hero .copy {
      align-items: flex-start;
    }
    .hero .actions {
      justify-content: center;
    }
  }
`}</style>

## Why RustQC?

<CardGrid stagger>
  <Card title="Identical Results" icon="approve-check">
    Produces bit-for-bit identical output to R's dupRadar and featureCounts,
    plus faithful reimplementations of 8 RSeQC tools (including TIN), preseq,
    and samtools. Over 800,000 values compared with zero mismatches.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Dramatically Faster" icon="rocket">
    Processes ~186M reads in ~32 minutes on AWS vs ~9h 21m+ of sequential tool
    runtimes — and replaces tools like TIN that fail entirely on large datasets.
  </Card>
  <Card title="All-in-One" icon="puzzle">
    Combines dupRadar, featureCounts, biotype counting, 8 RSeQC metrics
    (including TIN), preseq library complexity, gene body coverage, and samtools
    stats in a single pass — replacing 14+ separate tool invocations.
  </Card>
  <Card title="SAM / BAM / CRAM" icon="document">
    Accepts SAM, BAM, and CRAM alignment files. Process multiple files in
    parallel with automatic thread distribution.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

## Credits

RustQC is a reimplementation of the excellent [dupRadar](https://bioconductor.org/packages/dupRadar/)
Bioconductor package by Sergi Sayols, uses the same counting approach as
[Subread featureCounts](https://subread.sourceforge.net/) by Yang Liao and Wei Shi,
includes reimplementations of 8 tools from [RSeQC](https://rseqc.sourceforge.net/)
by Liguo Wang and colleagues, library complexity estimation from
[preseq](http://smithlabresearch.org/software/preseq/) by Timothy Daley and Andrew Smith,
and produces outputs compatible with [samtools](http://www.htslib.org/) and
[Qualimap](http://qualimap.conesalab.org/).

**If you use RustQC, please cite the original tools** — see the [Credits & Citation](about/credits/) page.

<script>
  {`
  function initBenchTooltips() {
    const tip = document.getElementById('bench-tooltip');
    if (!tip) return;
    const chart = tip.closest('.benchmark-chart');
    chart.querySelectorAll('.bench-seg[data-tip]').forEach(seg => {
      seg.addEventListener('mouseenter', e => {
        tip.textContent = e.target.dataset.tip;
        tip.style.display = 'block';
      });
      seg.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
        const r = chart.getBoundingClientRect();
        let x = e.clientX - r.left + 12;
        let y = e.clientY - r.top - 32;
        if (x + tip.offsetWidth > r.width) x = e.clientX - r.left - tip.offsetWidth - 8;
        if (y < 0) y = e.clientY - r.top + 16;
        tip.style.left = x + 'px';
        tip.style.top = y + 'px';
      });
      seg.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        tip.style.display = 'none';
      });
    });
  }
  // Run immediately (elements exist by the time inline scripts execute)
  initBenchTooltips();
  // Also re-run on Astro view transitions
  document.addEventListener('astro:page-load', initBenchTooltips);
`}
</script>
